mapper.sql: select id, market_slug, market_id, condition_id, event_slug, event_title, market_question, end_time, status, uma_resolution_status, result_outcome_index, result_outcome_name, order_count, total_afi_amount, total_usdt_amount, total_share_amount, total_payout_usdt_amount, last_check_time, settle_time, market_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time, remark, deleted from t_polymarket_market
mapper.insert: insert into t_polymarket_market ( market_slug, market_id, condition_id, event_slug, event_title, market_question, end_time, status, order_count, total_afi_amount, total_usdt_amount, total_share_amount, total_payout_usdt_amount, market_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time, remark, deleted ) values ( #{marketSlug}, #{marketId}, #{conditionId}, #{eventSlug}, #{eventTitle}, #{marketQuestion}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAfiAmount}, #{totalUsdtAmount}, #{totalShareAmount}, #{totalPayoutUsdtAmount}, #{marketSnapshotJson}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{deleted} ) on duplicate key update market_id = values(market_id), condition_id = values(condition_id), event_slug = values(event_slug), event_title = values(event_title), market_question = values(market_question), end_time = values(end_time), order_count = order_count + values(order_count), total_afi_amount = total_afi_amount + values(total_afi_amount), total_usdt_amount = total_usdt_amount + values(total_usdt_amount), total_share_amount = total_share_amount + values(total_share_amount), market_snapshot_json = values(market_snapshot_json), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update t_polymarket_market set status = 1, update_time = now() where market_slug = #{marketSlug} and status = 0 and deleted = 0
